entry.title: Orca: The World is in Your Mind
entry.summary: We introduce Orca, an initial instantiation of a general world foundation model. entry.title: The Mirage of Optimizing Training Policies: Monotonic Inference Policies as the Real Objective for LLM Reinforcement Learning

entry.title: Unlimited OCR Works

entry.title: LoopCoder-v2: Only Loop Once for Efficient Test-Time Computation Scaling

entry.title: Looped World Models
entry.summary: Current world models face a fundamental tension: faithful long-horizon simulation demands deep computation, but deeper models are expensive to deploy and prone to compounding errors. entry.title: VibeThinker-3B: Exploring the Frontier of Verifiable Reasoning in Small Language Models
